backend/main.mo: Main actor implementing OTP-based authentication (sendOTP, verifyOTP) with dev static OTP, user profile management with role-based access control using MixinAuthorization, and migration support for upgrading from old data structures.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old actor state (with mobile number keys and legacy data structures) to new actor state (with Principal keys and simplified user profiles), explicitly dropping all old study tracking data.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three features: LoginPage UI styling refinement, useOTPAuth backend integration, and LoginPage loading state implementation, all with high confidence and mapped to specific test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including pages (Login, Dashboard, Subjects, SyllabusTracker), components (Layout, Timer, Cards, ChapterList), hooks (useQueries with OTP auth and stub implementations), and styling configuration.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH-based color system defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes with neutral grayscale palette and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Tracky application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup with protected routes (dashboard, subjects, syllabus), OTP authentication checks, automatic profile setup handling, and loading states for initialization and profile fetching.
frontend/src/components/ChapterList.tsx: Chapter list component displaying incomplete and completed chapters with checkbox status toggling, study time display, chapter selection for timer tracking, and visual indicators for selected/completed states.
frontend/src/components/ChapterStatsCard: Displays a card showing chapter completion statistics with completed and pending counts, using icons and a total chapter count.
frontend/src/components/DashboardStopwat: A stopwatch component with start, pause, resume, and stop functionality, displaying elapsed time in HH:MM:SS format.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with header, navigation (Dashboard, Subjects, Syllabus Tracker), logo, user info, and logout functionality with responsive mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/MotivationalQuot: Displays a daily motivational quote selected based on the day of year from a predefined list of 20 quotes.
frontend/src/components/ProgressCard.tsx: Shows overall progress percentage across all subjects with a progress bar and trending icon.
frontend/src/components/ProgressReport.t: Comprehensive progress dashboard displaying total subjects, chapters, completed/pending counts, and overall completion percentage with progress bar.
frontend/src/components/StudyGoalCard.ts: Allows users to set and track daily study goals in minutes, showing progress toward the goal with a progress bar and completion indicator.
frontend/src/components/StudyTimeCard.ts: Displays total accumulated study time in a formatted string (hours and minutes) across all subjects.
frontend/src/components/StudyTimer.tsx: A timer component that tracks study time for selected chapters, with start/pause/resume/stop controls and saves elapsed time to the backend via mutation.
frontend/src/components/SubjectCard.tsx: Displays a subject card with name, creation date, and progress percentage with a visual progress bar.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages the backend actor with authentication, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality and identity state management using AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useOTPAuth.tsx: Manages OTP-based authentication state with mobile number storage in localStorage, providing login/logout and authentication status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for OTP auth, user profiles, subjects, and chapters; most backend methods are not yet implemented and return placeholder data.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark theme colors (blue/white palette), typography styles, and utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and InternetIdentity providers, then renders the App component.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Main dashboard page that displays progress cards, study time, chapter stats, motivational quotes, and a stopwatch using multiple query hooks to fetch and display user data.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Multi-step authentication page handling mobile number entry, OTP verification, and optional signup flow with profile creation for new users.
frontend/src/pages/SubjectsPage.tsx: Page for managing subjects with a form to add new subjects and a grid display of existing subjects using SubjectCard components.
frontend/src/pages/SyllabusTrackerPage.t: Syllabus management page that allows users to select subjects, add chapters, view chapter lists, and includes study timer and goal tracking components.
frontend/src/utils/timeFormatters.ts: Utility functions for formatting study time in minutes to readable strings in both short format (2h 30m) and long format (2 hours 30 minutes).
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters and session storage, supporting both regular query strings and hash-based routing.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended theme settings, animations, and plugin integrations for typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Project state file for 'Tracky', a student productivity app with OTP authentication, subject/chapter tracking, study timers, and progress reporting. Tracks 18 existing features including dashboard, syllabus tracking, study timer, and recently completed OTP-based authentication migration.
